detail.description: Luis Campusano singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Luis Campusano homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field.
Luis Campusano singles on a fly ball to center fielder Tommy Troy.
Luis Campusano singles on a line drive to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.
Luis Campusano singles on a ground ball to third baseman Nolan Arenado.
Luis Campusano singles on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Ty France scores. Gavin Sheets to 3rd.
Luis Campusano singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Gavin Sheets scores. Miguel Andujar to 2nd.
Luis Campusano singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Gavin Sheets scores. Ty France to 3rd.
Luis Campusano singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Luis Campusano homers (1) on a line drive to left field.
Luis Campusano hits a ground-rule double (4) on a line drive to right-center field.
Luis Campusano doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Jake McCarthy. Xander Bogaerts scores. Gavin Sheets to 3rd.
Luis Campusano doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Beck. Luis Campusano to 3rd. Luis Campusano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jordan Beck.
Luis Campusano homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Luis Campusano doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Luis Campusano singles on a line drive to center fielder Jarren Duran.
Luis Campusano doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Gavin Sheets scores.
Luis Campusano singles on a ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages. Sung-Mun Song to 3rd.
Luis Campusano singles on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Jase Bowen scores.
Luis Campusano doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jake Mangum. Bryce Johnson scores.
Luis Campusano singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brewer Hicklen. Jackson Merrill to 2nd.
